sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('R', 'b', 'N', 'M'):
        bnd = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in bnd)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in bnd)
        print(f"{n['color']}: top=({min_r},{min_c}), pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
